title: User Permission Management APIs
description:
This set of APIs allows managing user groups and associating users to the user groups. These user groups grant granular user permissions across Basware applications. The permissions granted by the user groups are managed in Basware Admin application.

Each of the managed applications needs to support permission management through cross application user groups and be configured to have cross application user groups enabled. Supported applications include AP Automation, SmartPDF and Vault.

permissionId.description: ExternalCode of Permission that is granted. Needs to be a Permission that is available in the application selected in 'applicationExternalCode'.

dimensionValues.description: Used to set application specific Permission dimensions. The fields available in this block, corresponding to application specific Permissions, depend on the selected application.

BulkOperationStatus.description: Represents the possible statuses of a bulk operation.

consumers.description:
List of consumer identifiers for whom default user groups should be created.
Permissible values: P2P, BwAdmin, SmartPdf.

changedBy.description: Username of user who made the change

CreateDefaultUserGroupsRequest.description: Represents a request to create default user groups for the specified consumers.

externalCode.description: Unique identifier for the user group. Used to identify the user group when it is updated.

organizationExternalCode.description: ExternalCode identifier for the organization on which the user group resides.

applications.description: Gets or sets the list of application names associated with the user group.

permissions.description: Gets or sets the list of permission ID's associated with the user group.

DefaultUserGroup.description:
Represents a default user group within an organization, including its unique identifier,
name, description, and associated organization information.

externalCode.description: Single item can be deleted using externalCode and final status is returned immediately.

lastUpdated.description: To delete records updated after specific time, use lastUpdated -field. This will delete all items that have been updated after the specified date. In response, user will get the taskStatus api link where the task status can be checked. Note: '0001-01-01' can be used to delete all records.

statusApiLink.description: Gets or sets the API link to check the status of the delete operation.

taskName.description: Gets or sets the name of the delete task.

taskStatus.description: Gets or sets the current status of the delete task.

DeleteResponse.description: Represents the response returned after a delete operation.

organizationExternalCode.description: External code of the organization on which the Permission is granted.

limit.description: Limit for the permission - for example invoice approval limit.

externalCodes.description: Gets or sets the list of external codes for batch retrieval.

externalCode.description: Single item can be deleted using externalCode and final status is returned immediately.

changedBy.description: The username of the user who deleted the record.

InternalDeleteDataRequest.description:
Represents a request to delete an entity internally/from consumer apps.
This request allows deletion using an external code, with an immediate final status response.

externalCode.description: Unique identifier for the user group. Used to identify the user group when it is updated.

organizationExternalCode.description: ExternalCode identifier for the organization on which the user group resides.

organizationHierarchy.description: Organization hierarchy path for the user group's organization.

changedBy.description: Username of user who made the change

userGroupAssociatedUsers.description: Collection of user-group associations to be created or updated.

InternalUserGroupAssociatedUsersSaveRequ.description:
Represents a request to save the association of users with one or more user groups.
Includes information about the user who performed the change.

changedBy.description: Username of user who made the change

userGroupPermissions.description: Collection of user group permissions to be created or updated.

InternalUserGroupPermissionsSaveRequest.description:
Represents a request to save permissions associated with one or more user groups.
Includes information about the user who performed the change.

changedBy.description: Username of user who made the change

userGroups.description: Collection of user groups to be created or updated.

InternalUserGroupSaveRequest.description:
Represents a request to save one or more user groups within the system.
Includes information about the user who performed the change.

externalCode.description: Unique identifier for the user group. Used to identify the user group when it is updated.

organizationExternalCode.description: ExternalCode identifier for the organization on which the user group resides.

UserGroup.description:
Represents a user group within an organization, including its unique identifier,
name, description, and associated organization information.

userGroupExternalCode.description: External code of the user group to which the user is associated.

userExternalCode.description: External code of the user associated to the user group.

userGroupExternalCode.description: ExternalCode of the user group whose Permissions are being defined.

applicationCode.description: Code of the application whose Permission is granted.

permissionId.description: Id of Permission that is granted. Needs to be a Permission that is available in the application selected in 'applicationCode'.

dimensionValues.description: Used to set application specific Permission dimensions. The fields available in this block, corresponding to application specific Permissions, depend on the selected application.

UserGroupPermission.description:
Represents a permission assignment for a specific user group within an application.
Each PMS.Domain.Entities.UserGroupPermission.UserGroupPermission defines the mapping between a user group,
an application, and a granted permission. It may also include application-specific
dimension values for fine-grained access control.

applicationCode.description: ExternalCode of the application whose Permission is granted through the Permission selected in 'PermissionExternalCode'. Needs to be an application that is listed in 'registeredApplications' API.

applicationPermissions.description: Used to set application specific Permission dimensions. The fields available in this block, corresponding to application specific Permissions, depend on the selected application.
